asset_name: Player leaf — Right drift steer state
shared_properties: The 32x32px footprint and five-lobe leaf anatomy stay fixed across all player steering states.
Core palette fields remain fixed at primary #E8722A, background #D4A96A, and accent #F5D060.
The brightest vein highlight remains centered to keep the player readable against obstacle clutter.
differences: The body leans right and the right lobe stretches to show lateral airflow response.
The stem trails to the left to reinforce momentum without changing the collision center.
Frame pacing prioritizes quick response timing over decorative secondary motion.

reference_images.label: leaf_beat_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the core loop, timing windows, obstacle pacing, UI layout, and Bevy target constraints.

reference_images.label: leaf_beat_player_sheet
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the player leaf silhouette, glow accent, and frame density for the responsive states.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: TextureAtlas sprite that tilts the authored leaf body right while keeping the gameplay pivot stable.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/character_player_leaf_right_drift_4f_12fps.png with the main player atlas set and select it when the drift direction is positive.
runtime_notes: Keep the collision anchor at the center vein while the artwork leans right so hitboxes remain stable.
Blend state entry and exit through timer-driven atlas swaps at 12fps to match the 0.3 second drift duration.
Expose this state to lane replay tools so input timing reviews can confirm lateral response direction.

context.usage: Shown on a correctly timed right input while the player nudges around a branch gate.

shape.silhouette: Leaf body tilts right with a stretched right lobe and a slightly trailing stem.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 128x32px with 4 frames of 32x32px and 0px spacing.
The center vein remains fully visible in every frame while the body leans right by at least 6 degrees.
The stem never clips outside the tile bounds and the silhouette stays readable over dark branch colors.
